impact: Enterprise beta scope will remain restricted until permission behavior passes review.
path_to_green: Security completes permission regression testing for the validated corpus and signs off on the beta access model.

dependency: Search relevance evaluation set for API documentation
impact: Required to validate answer quality before the enterprise beta gate.
path_to_green: API Services delivers the final labeled evaluation set and AI Platform publishes the relevance scorecard.

impact: Migration Wave 2 cannot enter the June maintenance window without an approved sequence.
path_to_green: API Services approves the split cutover plan after rollback rehearsal results are reviewed in steering.

impact: Cloud Infrastructure cannot preserve the rollback window without temporary spend coverage.
path_to_green: Product Management and Finance approve a time-boxed dual-run budget exception through the second cutover wave.

impact: Two customer workflows cannot move to the unified identity service until adapters are complete.
path_to_green: API Services finishes adapter testing and Security validates authentication audit events.

impact: Mobile beta needs the new session controls for enterprise account administration.
path_to_green: Identity Modernization publishes the release candidate and Mobile completes integration smoke testing.

impact: Design partner onboarding begins after release scope and known issues are approved.
path_to_green: Product Management signs off on the beta release scope and customer communication plan.

dependency: Reserved compute pool for production backfill
impact: Backfill performance testing will slip or contend with customer workloads without isolated capacity.
path_to_green: Cloud Infrastructure reserves the isolated compute pool and Platform Engineering verifies saturation alerts.

impact: Upgrade cannot exit parallel validation until business-critical dashboards reconcile.
path_to_green: Product Management and Finance close the remaining metric definition mismatches after parallel validation.

dependency: Managed network provider maintenance window confirmation
impact: The migration rollback plan requires vendor support coverage during the customer API cutover.
path_to_green: The vendor confirms the named support engineer, bridge details, and rollback coverage for the June maintenance window.
